message:
🐛 fix: System Updates checker rapid-fire errors (#8584) (#8591)

The update check effect in UpdateSettings fired on every forceCheck
identity change, and forceCheck's useCallback dependencies included
state that changes after each check — creating a rapid-fire loop.
Each cycle cleared the error then re-set it on failure, causing the
status line to flicker between "Up to date" and "Error checking
updates".

Changes:
- Guard the mount check with a ref so it fires exactly once instead
  of re-triggering on every forceCheck identity change
- Add consecutive failure tracking (ERROR_DISPLAY_THRESHOLD = 2) so
  transient errors don't flash red — only persistent failures show
- Move setError(null) to the success path in fetchReleases instead
  of eagerly clearing at the start of every fetch

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
